label: Transparent Caddisfly case motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated caddisfly larval case for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a single caddisfly case, accurate natural portable larval case made from assembled pebble-tan sand grains, small rounded stream pebbles, tiny twig splinters, leaf fragments, and wet fiber details; compact tapered tube shape with tactile modular texture, water-worn edges, muted forest-stream colors, crisp opaque silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole case without cropping, angled slightly so the assembled component structure is visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves pebble tan, leaf olive, reed fiber, silt gray, and subtle water-darkened crevices.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff or magenta anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no adult flying insect, no wings, no legs, no stream scene, no mossy background, no additional cases, no text, no watermark, no props, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Caddisfly" derived from the isolated caddisfly case motif: an assembled portable case made from pebble tan grains, leaf fragments, twig splinters, silt, and wet stream materials.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and component language from the caddisfly case motif. The board must visibly respect the motif colors: pebble tan, leaf fragment olive, reed fiber brown, silt gray, wet crevice umber, riffle water blue-green, shell highlight cream, and deep stream ink.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, 3840x2160 high-resolution source asset if available.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, spacious modular grid, avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Caddisfly", motif story, palette swatches, English typography, Japanese typography with short Japanese UI samples, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search palette, status states, loading/empty/error, texture strips, radius tokens, spacing tokens, shadow tokens, semantic color tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: clean product UI guidance, English and Japanese labels; multilingual UI should feel precise and quiet.
Visual language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system; assembled component system mood; small panels arranged like pebbles and leaf fragments but with component radii 8px or less; exact 8px grid; crisp borders; subtle waterline dividers; tactile grain texture; practical dashboard and form surfaces.
Palette behavior: warm shell surfaces on light background, deep stream ink text, pebble tan primary actions, leaf olive secondary controls, riffle water focus and charts, amber-brown status accents.
Text: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no adult caddisfly insect, no wings, no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no saturated unrelated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Caddisfly". It must be the same design system translated to dark mode, derived from the caddisfly case motif and the light-mode board, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the motif language of an assembled caddisfly larval case made from pebble-tan grains, leaf fragments, twig splinters, silt, and wet stream materials. Preserve the light board's component language: small assembled modules, crisp shadcn/tweakcn product controls, component radii 8px or less, exact 8px grid, tactile grain texture, waterline dividers, and modular dashboard panels.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, 3840x2160 high-resolution source asset if available.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, spacious layout, avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Caddisfly", "Dark Mode", palette swatches, English typography, Japanese typography with short Japanese UI samples, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search palette, status states, loading/empty/error, texture strips, radius tokens, spacing tokens, shadow tokens, semantic color tokens, generated asset examples.
Dark palette behavior: deep stream ink background, wet umber and basalt cards, shell-cream foreground text, pebble tan primary actions, leaf olive secondary controls, riffle water focus rings and charts, amber reed warnings, muted silt borders. Keep contrast restrained but readable.
Typography: clean product UI guidance, English and Japanese labels; multilingual UI should feel precise and quiet.
Visual language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dark product design system; assembled component system mood; tactile stream-case textures used as subtle overlays, never noisy.
Text: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no adult caddisfly insect, no wings, no standalone insect cutout, no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no generic purple or blue gradients, no saturated unrelated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
